text.title: React Hooks Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree for state placement + memoization + effect-vs-handler choices. Leaves reference rules from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the value need to survive across renders (component remounts not considered)?

conclusion.verdict: Compute inline in render body. No `useState`, no `useEffect`.

branch.question: Is the value derived from props or other state?

conclusion.verdict: Compute inline. If passed to memo'd child or used as hook dep → wrap in `useMemo`.

branch.question: Does it require a side-effect (subscription, fetch, timer)?
Is the effect triggered by render (mount / dep-change) or by user event?

conclusion.verdict: Plain event handler. Do NOT wrap in `useEffect`.

text.example: Component shows `fullName = first + ' ' + last`. q-needs-state: depends entirely on props → derived → derive-not-sync conclusion. No state, no effect, inline expression. Compare to sync-via-effect antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.
